name: HARVARD BIOSCIENCE INC
summary: Harvard Bioscience Inc. (HBIO) is a life science company that develops and sells tools and instruments for researchers. The company provides hardware and related products used in scientific research applications. Based on the 10-K filing's Item 1 section provided, detailed product and service specifics are contained in the full business description not fully excerpted here.
